author: LinOnetwo
description: Sync data between TidGi-Mobile <-> Desktop NodeJS App (TidGi)
text:
{"tiddlers":{"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/Config/SyncInterval":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/Config/SyncInterval","description":"minutes between sync","text":"3"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/Config/TiddlersPrefixToNotSync":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/Config/TiddlersPrefixToNotSync","text":"$:/state $:/temp"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/Config/TiddlersToNotSync":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/Config/TiddlersToNotSync","text":"$:/HistoryList $:/StoryList $:/Import $:/language $:/layout $:/config/OriginalTiddlerPaths"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/changelog":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/changelog","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! Changelog !! v1.1.0 * Fix System Tiddler Sync: Now correctly syncs modified system and shadow tiddlers (e.g. plugin configs) ** Updated incremental sync filter to `[all[shadows+tiddlers]]` to catch updates in overridden shadow tiddlers !! v1.0.0 - Enhanced Sync with Deletion Tracking and 3-Way Merge !!! Features * Bidirectional Deletion Sync: Implemented proper deletion synchronization between TidGi-Desktop and TidGi-Mobile ** Desktop → Mobile: Detects deleted tiddlers from git history and syncs them to mobile ** Mobile → Desktop: Syncs mobile deletions to desktop and properly removes files via FileSystemAdaptor ** Handles rename operations correctly (rename = delete old + create new) * 3-Way Merge for Conflict Resolution: Intelligent merge algorithm using git history ** Retrieves base version (common ancestor) from git at `lastSync` timestamp ** Uses TiddlyWiki's built-in `diff-match-patch` library (Google's diff-match-patch) ** Automatically merges non-conflicting changes from both sides ** Marks conflicts with clear indicators when both sides modify the same content ** Falls back to simple "newer version wins" strategy if base version unavailable * Git Service Integration: New methods added to TidGi-Desktop's git service ** `getDeletedTiddlersSinceDate(wikiFolderPath, sinceDate)`: Extracts deleted tiddler titles from git history ** `getTiddlerAtTime(wikiFolderPath, tiddlerTitle, beforeDate)`: Retrieves tiddler content at specific point in time ** Both methods accessible via `global.service.git` in TiddlyWiki plugins !!! Technical Details * Deletion tracking works by: ** Parsing git log with `--diff-filter=D` to find deleted `.tid` and `.meta` files ** Extracting `title:` field from deleted files in git history ** Sending deletion list to mobile via `ISyncEndPointResponse.deletes` * 3-way merge algorithm: ** Base version: Retrieved from git at `clientLastSync` timestamp ** Ours version: Client (mobile) current version ** Theirs version: Server (desktop) current version ** Creates patches from base→ours and base→theirs ** Applies both patch sets sequentially to merge changes * File cleanup improvements: ** Mobile now properly deletes filesystem files when receiving server deletions ** Desktop's FileSystemAdaptor automatically handles file deletion on `deleteTiddler()` !!! Merge Scenarios * No conflict: If only one side modified, uses that side's changes * Different sections: If both sides modified different parts, merges both changes * Real conflict: If both sides modified same content, marks with `` comment !!! Fallback Behavior * If git history unavailable: Falls back to "newer modified time wins" strategy * If 3-way merge fails: Uses simple merge with newer version * Ensures sync continues even if advanced features fail !!! Dependencies * Requires TidGi-Desktop with git service support * Uses `$:/core/modules/utils/diff-match-patch/diff_match_patch.js` from TiddlyWiki core * Mobile deletion tracking via SQLite `TiddlerChangeSQLModel` table !!! Breaking Changes None. All changes are backward compatible with graceful fallbacks. !!! Bug Fixes * Fixed deletion sync not working from desktop to mobile * Fixed rename operations not syncing properly * Fixed filesystem files not being cleaned up on mobile after server-side deletion "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/develop":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/develop","creator":"LinOnetwo","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"TidGi-Mobile now uses a pre-built HTML from the `tiddlywiki` npm package's `$:/core/save/empty` template (rendered at build time). The old skinny HTML download endpoint and templates have been removed. This plugin provides Git Smart HTTP endpoints for TidGi-Mobile to sync via `isomorphic-git`. Use [[SIOC|https://github.com/taurenshaman/semantic-web/blob/cee9e421eed3f31a602f82375fb92fb109d638b7/data/sioc.rdf]] Ontology for server tiddler. "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/readme","creator":"LinOnetwo","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\define image() >/> \end ! Sync Between NodeJS and TidGi-Mobile 在桌面端（NodeJS）和太记移动端之间同步 本插件可以让你在基于NodeJS技术的桌面应用（例如太记）和太记移动端 App 之间同步数据。 手机应用 ↔ 桌面应用 ↔ 云端 不支持 Tiddloid。请改用 `tw-html-nodejs-sync` 插件。 This plugin enables you sync date between NodeJS server App (e.g. TidGi App) and TidGi-Mobile App. TidGi-Mobile App ↔ Desktop App ↔ Cloud Tiddloid is not supported. Use `tw-html-nodejs-sync` plugin instead. !! How to use 首先在手机端扫码，打开当前这个知识库的网页，然后保存出 HTML 文件后（详见中文教程的[[如何保存|https://tw-cn.netlify.app/#TiddlyGit%E5%A4%AA%E8%AE%B0]]章节），在 Tiddloid 里打开保存的 HTML 文件（可能需要先将文件移出下载目录不然Tiddloid无权限访问，详见其[[说明书|https://github.com/donmor/Tiddloid]]）。 然后打开[[服务器列表|$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/ServerList]]，录入一下服务器地址： # 将上面扫码得到的 URL 复制一下，填入[[服务器列表|$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/ServerList]]里的「智能识别黏贴框」，然后点击「智能识别」按钮，会自动将 URL 解析后填入相应框内。你也可以点击「扫二维码」按钮开始扫码，扫码结果会自动填入「智能识别黏贴框」内 # 此时，「服务器IP」和「服务器端口」框里应该要已经填好了 ip 和端口号 # 你需要填写一下「服务器名」这个框 # 点击「新增服务器」，会新建一个服务器信息条目，请确认创建此条目 # 这时新的服务器应该就出现在服务器列表里了，你可以点击「启用同步并立即同步」按钮，这样就可以在桌面端和手机端同步数据了 # 之后会每五分钟自动同步一次用户创建的条目（不包含插件），如果需要从桌面端同步插件到手机端，需要使用「[[拉取并覆盖|$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/DownloadFullHtml]]」功能 First scan the code on your cell phone, open the current knowledge base page, then save the HTML file (see the [[How to save|https://tw-cn.netlify.app/#TiddlyGit%E5%A4%AA%E8%AE%B0]] section of the Chinese tutorial for more details) and open the saved HTML file in Tiddloid (You may need to move the file out of the download directory first or Tiddloid will not have access to it, see its [[Instructions|https://github.com/donmor/Tiddloid]] for details). Then open the [[Server List|$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/ServerList]] and enter the following server address. # Copy the URL you got from the code above and fill in the "Smart Identify Sticky Box" in [[Server List|$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/ServerList]], then click the "Smart Identify" button, the URL will be automatically parsed and filled in the corresponding box. You can also click the "Scan QR Code" button to start scanning the code, and the result will be automatically filled into the "Smart Identify Sticky Box". # At this point, the "Server IP" and "Server Port" boxes should already be filled with the ip and port numbers. # You need to fill in the "server name" box # Click on "Add Server", a new server information entry will be created, please confirm to create this entry # The new server should now appear in the server list, you can click the "Enable sync and sync now" button to sync data between desktop and mobile. # If you need to sync the plugin from desktop to mobile, you need to use the "[[pull and overwrite|$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/DownloadFullHtml]]" function. Translated with www.DeepL.com/Translator (free version) !! Server list and forms 服务器列表和新增表单 [[Server List|$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/ServerList]] contains syncable servers, and button to add new server. !! QrCode of current server 当前服务器的二维码 <$set name="content" value={{{ [{$:/info/url/host}addprefix[//]addprefix{$:/info/url/protocol}addsuffix[/tw-mobile-sync/get-full-html]] }}}> <> <> Scan to add this server 扫码以添加此服务器 ({{$:/info/url/full}}). （二维码：当前服务器的地址） Needs official QR plugin [[$:/plugins/tiddlywiki/qrcode]] to work. 需要安装官方二维码插件 [[$:/plugins/tiddlywiki/qrcode]] 才会有二维码出现在上面 !! FAQ 常见问题 !!! 在外面用了一天之后回家添加服务器，却无法同步到电脑端 When you come home to add a server after using it outside for a day, it won't sync to the computer side 就是因为你新添加服务器后，它只会同步新建服务器之后新建的条目。这是又因为新建服务器时会根据当前时间添加一个 lastSync 字段，目前在点击同步按钮时，只会同步这个时间点之后的内容。你可以手动把服务器条目里这个字段的时间改早一天，这样就会同步你今天添加的内容了。未来我们将会添加更智能的同步方式，就不再需要这个字段了，就不会遇到这个问题了。 This is because when you add a new server, it only syncs the new entries created after the new server is created. This is again because when you create a new server you add a lastSync field based on the current time, and currently when you click the sync button it will only sync after this point in time. You can manually change the time of this field in the server entry to one day earlier, and it will sync the content you added today. In the future we will add a smarter way of syncing so that this field is no longer needed and you won't encounter this problem. "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/ControlPanel/Settings":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/ControlPanel/Settings","caption":"MobileSync","tags":"$:/tags/ControlPanel/SettingsTab","text":"These settings let you customise the behaviour of TW-MobileSync plugin. --- !! Sync !!! Sync Interval Normally, sync happened in local wiki, so it is free, so you can sync it frequently. This setting takes effect after refresh. Minutes between sync: <$edit-text tiddler="$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/Config/SyncInterval" field="text" default="3" tabindex=-1 focus=false cancelPopups="yes" fileDrop=no tag="input" /> "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/DownloadFullHtml":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/DownloadFullHtml","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$list filter="[prefix[$:/state/tw-mobile-sync/server/]field:text[onlineActive]]">
拉取并覆盖 Pull and override
拉取服务端最新完整内容覆盖本地所有内容 Pull the latest complete content from the server to cover all local content
普通同步没法更新插件和导入的内容，如果你在电脑端更新或安装了插件，则需要在移动端点下面的按钮做一次完整拉取。
If you have updated or installed the plugin on your computer, you will need to do a full pull on the mobile side by clicking the button below.
请慎重点击，本地若有未同步内容将丢失！如果确保本地没有未同步内容，则可以放心拉取。
Please click carefully, local unsynced content will be lost if there is any! If you make sure there is no unsynced content locally, you can pull it without worry.
<$button>
{{!!name}}
拉取内容覆盖本地 Pull content to cover local
<$action-sendmessage $message="tw-mobile-sync-download-full-html" />
"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/ServerItemCopyTemplate":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/ServerItemCopyTemplate","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$button class="tw-mobile-sync-copy-button">

filter="[[$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/base]]"> .tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-mobile-content, .tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-desktop-content { width: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; } @media (min-width: <>) { .tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-mobile-content { display: none; } } @media (max-width: <>) { .tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-desktop-content { display: none; } } "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/style.css":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/style.css","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$importvariables filter="[[$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/base]]"> .tw-mobile-sync-server-list { padding-left: 0; overflow: auto; overflow: overlay; } .tw-mobile-sync-sync-button { width: 100%; height: 100px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; max-width: 300px; min-width: 175px; } .tw-mobile-sync-copy-button { height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; margin-left: 10px !important; } .tw-mobile-sync-sync-reveal { margin-left: 20px; } .tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-container-outer2 textarea, .tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-container-outer2 input { width: 100%; } .tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-container-outer2 { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-container { display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: center; align-items: center; } .tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-container-outer1 { display: flex; flex-direction: row; } @media (max-width: 535px) { .tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-container-outer1 { flex-direction: column; } } .tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-buttons
